item_text: the diagram models a simple user registration process with two possible outcomes: successful registration or not.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-userregistration-002 title: failed user registration (password mismatch) module: userregistration source pages: 2 preconditions: application is running. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - confirm password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "utente non registrato". 3. enter "testuser" as the username. 4. enter "testpassword" as the password. 5. enter "wrongpassword" as the confirm password. 6. click on "utente registrato con successo al servizio?". expected result: the system should display an error message indicating that the passwords do not match.
